prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科约22512名→2023年约39041名（大幅后移）→2024年约21383名（明显回升）→2025年物理类约66644名（新高考首年大幅后移），2025年基准约66644名 。近4年波动剧烈，2025年因四川省首次新高考选科模式调整，位次出现结构性后移；本省理科/物理类计划：2022年76人→2023年77人→2024年81人→2025年79人→ 2026年81人，较2025年小幅扩招约2.5%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021年约第135名→2025年约第86名→2026年 约第85名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因招聘公告设置不当条件引发舆情，校方已终止招聘并致歉，对报考心理有一 定负面影响；抖音热度排名第76位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；未见明显投档断档记录；植物保护获评A-，为该校唯一A类学科，与农学、植物 生产类等招生专业直接关联，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（计算 机类、人工智能、电子信息类等）高度匹配，推高相关专业报考热度；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约535000人，较2025年（物理类284789+历史类177978=462767人）增加约15.6 %，物理类考生按比例估算约329000人，竞争加剧；贵州大学位于邻省贵州，与四川地理相近、文化相通，对四川考生有一定地 域吸引力；该校在四川招生人数占比较小（2025年约2.3%），属省外招生规模适中。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大幅后移、2026年计划小幅扩招、软科排名持续 上升、四川省考生明显增加及计算机/电子信息类专业持续高热等因素，考虑扩招缓解效应与考生增加、专业热度推高竞争相互抵消，预计2026 年最低录取位次约67606名，区间67106–68106名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, science ranking approximately 22512 → 2023 approximately 39041 (significant backward shift) → 2024 approximately 21383 (obvious rebound) → 2025 physics category approximately 66644 (significant backward shift in the first year of the new college entrance examination), 2025 baseline approximately 66644. Fluctuated sharply in the past 4 years. In 2025, due to the adjustment of the subject selection model for the first new college entrance examination in Sichuan Province, the ranking experienced a structural backward shift; provincial science/physics category plan: 2022 76 people → 2023 77 people → 2024 81 people → 2025 79 people → 2026 81 people, a slight expansion of about 2.5% compared to 2025, competition slightly eased.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking continues to rise: 2021 approximately 135th → 2025 approximately 86th → 2026 approximately 85th, ranking steadily improved in recent years, school comprehensive strength enhanced; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in recruitment announcements causing public opinion, the school has terminated recruitment and apologized, having a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 76th, evaluation average, short video platform exposure moderately low; no obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded; Plant Protection rated A-, the only A-class discipline of the school, directly related to enrollment majors such as agriculture and plant production, having some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly matching the school's physics category enrollment majors (Computer, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, etc.), boosting application heat for related majors; total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (physics category 284,789 + history category 177,978 = 462,767), physics category candidates estimated at approximately 329,000, competition intensifies; Guizhou University is located in neighboring Guizhou Province, geographically close and culturally similar to Sichuan, having some regional appeal for Sichuan candidates; the school's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is relatively small (2025 about 2.3%), belonging to moderate scale of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant backward shift in rankings in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, slight expansion in 2026 plan, continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, significant increase in Sichuan candidates, and sustained high heat of computer/electronic information majors, taking into account the easing effect of expansion and the increase in candidates, and the mutual offset of major heat pushing up competition, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be approximately 67606, with a range of 67106–68106.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., below 67106), focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., above 68106), mainly fill in Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, liberal arts approximately 4823rd place → 2023 approximately 4603rd place → 2024 approximately 4052nd place (best in recent 3 years) → 2025 history category approximately 4765th place, with rankings fluctuating in the 4000–4800 range over the past 4 years, and a 2025 baseline of approximately 4765th place; provincial liberal arts/history category plans: 2022: 21 people → 2023: 20 people → 2024: 18 people → 2025: 18 people → 2026: 26 people, a significant expansion of about 44.4% compared to 2025, greatly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking continuously rising: 2021 approximately 135th place → 2025 approximately 86th place → 2026 approximately 85th place, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing overall institutional strength; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in a recruitment announcement causing public opinion backlash, with the school terminating the recruitment and apologizing, having a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 76th, rated as average, with moderate to low exposure on short video platforms; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Plant Protection rated A-, the only A-class discipline at the school, though not directly related to liberal arts majors, it reflects the school's overall academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature are socially hot/recommended, highly matching the school's history category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc.), driving up application heat for related majors; total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Sichuan Province in 2026 is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (Physics Category 284,789 + History Category 177,978 = 462,767), with history category students estimated at about 206,000, intensifying competition; Guizhou University is located in neighboring Guizhou Province, geographically close and culturally similar to Sichuan, offering some regional appeal to Sichuan candidates; the school's enrollment share in Sichuan is relatively small (about 2.3% in 2025), representing a moderate scale of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 ranking baseline of 4765th place, a significant expansion of about 44.4% in 2026, continuously rising Soft Science rankings, a notable increase in Sichuan candidates, and high popularity of liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature, considering that the large expansion is partially offset by increased candidates and major popularity driving up competition, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 5836th place, with a range of 5336–6336th place.
